codeReview.summary: Feature is correctly implemented end-to-end for persistent bank reconciliation sessions. New session/item persistence model exists with proper company scoping and uniqueness constraints; lifecycle endpoints are exposed for start/update/complete/list/detail; legacy bank reconciliation flow delegates through session lifecycle; completion enforces DRAFT-only transition and optionally confirms linked period reconciliation; and gate-fast/typecheck validators pass. Unit coverage verifies core lifecycle behavior (create/update/complete/history/detail/legacy delegate).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Task-based scrutiny reviewer spawning is not currently reliable in this mission environment because model alias resolution fails before reviewers run.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Task invocations fail with 'Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.3-codex-xhigh-pro' despite available custom aliases being space-separated labels (e.g., '5.3 codex xhigh pro').

summary: PASS. Persistent session-based bank reconciliation behavior, storage, APIs, and backward-compatible delegation are all present and validated by tests and gate-fast run.
